name: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. is a major U.S. passenger airline operating domestic and international air travel services. Its subsidiaries include AirTran Airways, Inc. (Delaware), AirTran Holdings, LLC (Texas), Southwest Jet Fuel Co. (Texas), Triple Crown Assurance Co. (Texas), and Southwest Airlines India Private Limited (India), supporting aviation operations, fuel procurement, insurance, and international business activities.

products.name: Passenger Air Transportation
products.description: Commercial airline passenger services operated by Southwest Airlines and subsidiary AirTran Airways.

products.name: Jet Fuel Procurement
products.description: Fuel supply operations managed through subsidiary Southwest Jet Fuel Co.

products.name: Insurance/Assurance Services
products.description: Insurance-related services provided through subsidiary Triple Crown Assurance Co.

products.name: Passenger Air Travel
products.description: Commercial airline passenger transportation services operated by Southwest Airlines Co.

products.name: Jet Fuel Procurement
products.description: Fuel supply and procurement services via subsidiary Southwest Jet Fuel Co.

products.name: Insurance Services
products.description: Assurance and insurance services provided through subsidiary Triple Crown Assurance Co.
